items.title: Dow Jones futures gain on tech rally, awaits Trump-Xi talks updates, US Retail Sales
items.summary: Dow Jones futures rise 0.30% to near 49,950 during the European hours on Wednesday, ahead of the United States (US) regular opening. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 advance 0.19% to near 7,480, and the Nasdaq 100 futures gain

items.title: Euro: Strategic autonomy and yuan challenge – Rabobank
items.summary: Rabobank's Global Strategist Michael Every notes Europe’s evolving role in global finance as Euroclear considers accepting China onshore bonds traded in Hong Kong as collateral.
items.title_ko: 유로: 전략적 자율성 및 위안화 도전 – Rabobank
items.summary_ko: Rabobank의 글로벌 전략가 Michael Every은 Euroclear가 홍콩에서 거래되는 중국 역내 채권을 담보로 받아들이는 것을 고려하면서 글로벌 금융에서 유럽의 진화하는 역할에 주목합니다.
